signals.reasoning: Cover the live LIT short immediately. The position has fully round-tripped from a meaningful winner to a live loss, retained none of peak PnL, has an urgent giveback warning, and still has no stop in place. Even though the broader chart is still weak, this specific position has already failed the management test and should be cleaned up.

BTC remains fragile under the active geopolitical veto, but the current state is still a post-flush grind rather than a clean fresh edge. After cleaning up LIT, the better stance is patience rather than forcing a new macro trade here.
ETH is still heavy, yet the move already reflects a broad liquidation flush and the event brake remains active. It is not a better action point than simply exiting the broken LIT position.

SOL continues to trade in a weak post-breakdown range, but this is already a developed move and not a cleaner signal than the live cleanup exit. Keep it on the bearish watchlist without forcing action.

IP has squeeze fuel from strongly negative funding, but the macro veto is active and the tape is already damaged. That makes it an interesting watchlist name, not something that should distract from protecting capital in LIT.
FARTCOIN remains weak, but the price/OI profile is still a long-liquidation flush after a big drawdown, so the fresh short edge is lower quality than it first looks.
MERL is still soft, but it is already in post-flush territory and the liquidity is not good enough to justify acting under the current veto. Watch only.
NOT is too thin and too damaged to act on directly. Negative funding gives it squeeze risk, but the depth is poor and the current setup is not reliable enough to promote.
MAV still leans bearish on raw mechanics, but the notional liquidity is too weak and the move is already well underway. It stays in watch-only territory.
ACE has notable squeeze fuel from negative funding, but the chart is already damaged and the market depth remains weak. Under veto, that is not enough to justify a fresh trade.

GOAT has extreme negative funding and a violent washout profile, which raises squeeze risk more than it creates a clean short. It is too unstable and too thin to prefer over simply flattening the broken live position.
